glassmorphism.card: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors duration-300

borders.tracing_beam: relative after:absolute after:inset-0 after:rounded-lg after:p-[1px] after:bg-gradient-to-r after:from-transparent after:via-indigo-500 after:to-transparent after:opacity-0 hover:after:opacity-100 after:transition-opacity

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

kanban.column: bg-zinc-900/30 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl border border-white/5 p-4 min-w-[300px]
kanban.card: bg-zinc-800/50 hover:bg-zinc-800/80 border border-white/5 rounded-lg p-4 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-indigo-500/30 group relative overflow-hidden

hero_background.description: Abstract streaks of light on a dark background, perfect for hero section overlay

login_background.description: Abstract movement streaks, dynamic and modern for auth pages

team_collaboration.description: Diverse professional team working in modern office, for About/Team page

feature_abstract.description: Abstract yellow lines, good for 'Performance' or 'Analytics' feature section

setup: Install date-fns: `yarn add date-fns` (if not present)
Ensure tailwind.config.js has the custom colors and animations defined in this file.
implementation_rules: Use the 'Manrope' font for all headings (h1-h4).
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for task IDs, code snippets, and tabular data.
Implement the 'Cyber-Executive' theme: Dark Zinc backgrounds with Indigo/Violet accents.
For the Kanban board, ensure columns have a glassmorphism effect (bg-zinc-900/30 backdrop-blur-sm).
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-950 (#09090b) as the darkest shade.
Add 'tracing beam' or subtle glow effects to active cards or selected items.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' designs. Push for asymmetry and unique layouts.
Dark colors must be rich (tinted with blue/violet), not muddy gray.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. 'p-8' is the new 'p-4'.
Never use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties (transform, opacity, colors).
Do not center-align the entire app. Use left alignment for readability.
Use glassmorphism with `backdrop-blur-xl` for overlays and sticky headers.
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover, click, focus).
Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
